name: Recovery Validation Checklist
description: Validates that systems have been properly restored after an incident by executing a recovery verification checklist. A code node queries the list of affected systems from the investigation. Riggs AI assesses the restoration state and generates validation criteria. A loop iterates through each affected system to run health checks. A decision node evaluates whether all systems pass validation. Passing systems receive sign-off, while failing systems are flagged for re-remediation. The final recovery status is posted to stakeholders and the incident status is updated.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Run endpoint health checks to verify systems are clean and operational

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Track recovery validation results and flag systems requiring re-remediation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Post recovery validation results to stakeholders

config.description: Manually triggered after incident remediation to validate that all affected systems are properly restored

config.query: SELECT hostname, device_id, remediation_action, remediation_time FROM affected_systems WHERE investigation_id = '{{trigger_1.investigation_id}}' AND status = 'remediated'
config.description: Retrieve the list of all affected and remediated systems that require recovery validation

config.additional_instructions: Based on the incident type and remediation actions taken, generate specific recovery validation criteria. Include: endpoint health checks, service availability, IOC re-scan, user access verification, and data integrity checks.
config.description: AI-powered generation of recovery validation criteria tailored to the incident type and remediation performed
Iterate over each affected system to run recovery health checks
Execute a full endpoint health scan to verify the system is clean and operational
Check whether all systems passed the recovery validation health checks
Post recovery sign-off confirmation to stakeholders when all systems pass validation
Update the incident status to recovered after all systems pass validation
Recovery validation complete — all systems passed health checks, incident marked as recovered
Create a Jira ticket for systems that failed recovery validation and require re-remediation
Alert the SOC team about systems that failed recovery validation
Recovery validation found failures — re-remediation ticket created, SOC alerted
